case_title: JALALIAN, ARMEN VS IMR ROOFING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CERTFD.MAIL TO JALALIAN ARMEN RETURNED SIGNED;
